This family includes about 200 species of plants, with most of them being found in tropical and subtropical regions. Turibana nipponica itself is a species of flowering plant native to Japan. The classification of Turibana nipponica is further refined to the genus Turibana, which is a small group of plants within the Lythraceae family.
